query: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN freeAlertsRemaining INT DEFAULT 10 NOT NULL AFTER contractSize; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN freeTrialStartedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER freeAlertsRemaining; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN freeTrialExhaustedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER freeTrialStartedAt;
